name: @radzor/auth-oauth
description: OAuth 2.0 authentication flow supporting multiple providers (Google, GitHub, Discord). Handles token exchange, session management, and user profile retrieval.

inputs.name: providers
inputs.description: List of OAuth providers to enable.

inputs.name: redirectUrl
inputs.description: URL to redirect to after successful authentication.

inputs.name: scopes
inputs.description: OAuth scopes to request from the provider.

inputs.name: clientCredentials
inputs.description: OAuth client credentials for each enabled provider. Keys must match the provider names.

inputs.name: jwtSecret
inputs.description: Secret key used to sign and verify JWT session tokens.

outputs.name: session
outputs.description: Current authentication session containing access token, refresh token, and expiry.

outputs.name: user
outputs.description: Authenticated user profile with id, email, name, and avatar.

events.name: onLogin
events.description: Fired when a user successfully authenticates.

events.name: onLogout
events.description: Fired when a user logs out.

events.name: onTokenRefresh
events.description: Fired when the access token is automatically refreshed.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on authentication errors (invalid token, provider error, etc.).

actions.name: login

params.name: provider
params.description: The OAuth provider to authenticate with.

actions.description: Get the authorization URL to redirect the user to for the specified provider.

actions.name: handleCallback

params.name: provider
params.description: The OAuth provider that sent the callback.

params.name: code
params.description: The authorization code from the OAuth callback.

actions.description: Exchange the authorization code for tokens and fetch the user profile.

actions.name: logout
actions.description: End the current session and revoke tokens.

actions.name: getSession
actions.description: Get the current authentication session, or null if not authenticated.

actions.name: getUser
actions.description: Get the current authenticated user profile, or null if not authenticated.

actions.name: refreshToken
actions.description: Manually refresh the access token using the refresh token.

actions.name: createSessionToken
actions.description: Create a signed JWT for the current session (for server-side cookies).

actions.name: verifySessionToken

params.name: token
params.description: The JWT session token to verify.

actions.description: Verify and decode a session JWT.

llm.constraints: Requires OAuth client credentials (client ID + secret) for each provider. Server-side token exchange requires a backend route.
